problem.statement: The IDE Delivery column still needs one canonical delivery payload and one scene command instead of local reconstruction.
problem.scope: Delivery projection envelope and command only.
problem.symptom: Delivery data is still assembled from mixed evidence instead of one engine-owned payload.

decision_policy: one json command returns one payload
execution_flow: request delivery projection from scene scope

hypotheses.statement: One scene payload will remove the need for local delivery reconstruction.

risks.statement: Payload fields may drift if unstable data is treated as canonical.

decision_execution_path.decision: return the payload from one scene command

triggers: a field has no stable source
actions: omit the field until the source is stable
attach debug evidence for source or scope mismatch
